qas.a: person who is actively engaged in killing or attempting to kill people in a confined and populated area

qas.q: who is required to mediate harm to victims
qas.a: second wave of police officers and first responders

qas.q: 3 things you can do to respond to an active shooter
what is your priority in this type of situation

qas.a: leave out closest exit, go to designated spot from police, don't leave until told to do so

qas.q: what is required in order to stop ashooting
how to let police know you're not the shooter
qas.a: putting hands above head palms out fingers spread

qas.q: important steps if you need to hide
qas.a:
room that can be locked
close, lock all windows & doors
turn off all lights
small target/lay on ground
dont respond to any voice commands until can verify w/ certainty that they are law enforcement

qas.q: last resort of response to active shooter
what to do when law enforcement arrives
qas.a:
follow their instructions
dont make quick movements
put down any bags/packages
do not ask officer for help
do not point/scream/yell
do not leave and go home; potential witness

location of shooter
# of shooter(s)
physical description of shooter
# and type of weapons
# potential victims
